clist.main.title.title: Command List
clist.main.footer: Use >>link command to get the bot's invite link and the official discord guild's invite link.
clist.page1.title.title: Command List-Page1
clist.page1.command4.p2: Specify the type of picture in <type>(ex:other、iruma、WTF、r18、yellow-card).
clist.page1.command5: Send the bot's self introduce to you.
clist.page2.title.title: Command List-page2
clist.page2.command1: Get the latest video of the channels in the guild's Youtube channel list.
clist.page2.command2: Get the guild's Youtube channel list.
clist.page2.command3: Get the number of the channels in the guild's Youtube channel list's subscribers.
clist.page2.command3.p1: Get the specified channel's number of subscribers.
clist.page2.command3.p2: Specify a Youtube channel in <id> by type it's channel id.
clist.page3.title.title: Command List-Page3
clist.page3.command3: Get the current time of the guild's timezone.
clist.page3.command4.p1: Get the current time of the specified timezone
clist.page3.command5: Get the bot's invite url and the official discord guild's invite url
clist.page4.title.title: Command List-Page4
clist.page4.command1.p2: Specify how many message you want to delete in <limit>.
clist.page4.command2.p1: Add a Youtube channel into the guild's Youtube channel list.
clist.page4.command2.p2: Specify a Youtube channel's channel id that you want to add into the guild's Youtube channel list.
clist.page4.command3.p1: Remove a Youtube channel from the guild's Youtube channel list.
clist.page4.command3.p2: Specify the channel which you want to remove in <chid>.
clist.page4.command4: Show all the channels in the guild's Youtube channel list.
clist.page4.command5.p2: Set what time the reminder will be activated in <time>(format:Year[four numbers]-month[two numbers]-day[two numbers]-hour[two numbers]-minute[two numbers])
clist.page4.command5.p3: Set what the reminder will say when it is activated in <info>.
clist.page4.command6.p2: Specify a reminder to edit in <wremind>
clist.page4.command6.p3: Set what time the reminder will be activated in <time>(format:Year[four numbers]-month[two numbers]-day[two numbers]-hour[two numbers]-minute[two numbers])
clist.page4.command6.p4: Set what the reminder will say when it is activated in <info>.
clist.page4.command7: Show all the reminder in this guild.
clist.page4.command8: Set the channel which channel you use the command as an announcement channel,and the reminder will send message to the announcement channel when it is activated.
clist.page4.command9: Show what channel the announcement channel of this guild is.
clist.page4.command12.p2: Specify the number of the reminder what you wan to remove i <wremind>
clist.page4.command13: Clear all data excluding money, exp and reminders of the guild.
clist.page4.command14: Clear all data of the guild.
